title: Universal Tool Deluxe Wood Burning Kit Assorted Tips Stencils and Tweezers
description:
Create amazing wood craft art with this 56pc Complete Wood Burning Pen and Stencil Arts and Craft Hobby Tool Kit! This kit comes with a wood burning pen, (9) assorted brass tips and accessories, 28 stencils for burning intricate and unique designs into unfinished wood and a top close hobby and craft tool box to organize and keep tiddy all the tools used to create your intricate art. We've also included some extra items to help you complete your project with precision - a "helping hand" station to hold your work in place as you use the pen, 5 assorted tip tweezers, and a microfiber towel to keep your work-space clean. Everything fits neatly inside of a handy black tool box. This is a great gift idea for beginners and seasoned veterans alike.
